messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OKE. Provide technical guidance on cluster creation, node pools, and Kubernetes deployments.
Como criar oke no compartment production?

Para usar Containers no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar cluster OKE
oci ce cluster create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "oke-production-0001" \
  --kubernetes-version "v1.29.0" \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid>

# Configurar kubectl
oci ce cluster create-kubeconfig \
  --cluster-id <cluster-ocid> \
  --file $HOME/.kube/config \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --token-version 2.0.0

kubectl get nodes
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/ContEng/Concepts/contengoverview.htm

```bash
kubectl get nodes
```

```bash
  --kubernetes-version "v1.29.0" \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid>

# Configurar kubectl
oci ce cluster create-kubeconfig \
  --cluster-id <cluster-ocid> \
  --file $HOME/.kube/config \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --token-version 2.0.0

kubectl get nodes
```
